chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Intra Court Appeal No. D – 01 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.1087/2023 (E/A) 3. For hearing of main case 25.10.2023 Appellants are called absent. The case diary shows that since filing of this Intra Court Appeal, which prima facie appears to be non-maintainable, on 07.06.2023, appellants have not attempted to proceed with the appeal and reply to the office objection regarding its maintainability. Today also none has appeared and no intimation is received. Accordingly, appeal is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
